title: DATime - Mod Time day/night
description:
The Datime mod slows down Minecraft's day/night cycle to match real-world time. Specifically, it extends one full Minecraft day (normally 20 minutes) to 1 hour and 30 minutes in real life.

work with tick world not tick server.
body:
⚙️ How it works:

    Vanilla time progression is disabled (doDaylightCycle = false).

    The mod manually advances the world's time by 0.2222 ticks per server tick, which equals 4.444 ticks per second, instead of the default 20.

    This simulates a much slower day/night rhythm without affecting gameplay or server performance.

⏱️ Technical Details:

    The server continues running at 20 ticks per second.

    Only the world's time (timeOfDay) is modified.

    Entities, redstone, player actions, etc., remain at normal speed.

    A full cycle (24,000 ticks) now takes 5400 seconds = 90 minutes IRL.

        ☀️ Day (0–12000 ticks): 45 minutes

        🌙 Night (12000–24000 ticks): 45 minutes
